Privacy-focused website analytics. Query: Privacy-focused website analytics. Query your site traffic, manage sites and events, and generate custom reports.
\nTo create an API token:\n1. Go to [htt:
To create an API token:
1. Go to [https://app.usefathom.com/api](https://app.usefathom.com/api)
2. Click **Create new**
3. Give your token a name and set permissions (Admin, Read Only, or site-specific)
4. Click **Save changes**
5. Copy your API token — you won't be able to retrieve it again after navigating away
Return a list of all sites this API key: Return a list of all sites this API key has access to.

End date for the report in ISO 8601 form: End date for the report in ISO 8601 format (e.g., 2024-12-31T23:59:59.999999Z).
